description: MaR - Matcher and Replacer, Perform intelligent replacement based on precise matching. A BurpSuite plugin for HTTP packet modification.
notes: 【主要功能】: MaR - Matcher and Replacer, Perform intelligent replacement based on precise matching. A BurpSuite plugin for HTTP packet modification.
【适用场景】: HTTP报文智能匹配替换、请求修改、渗透测试
【技术特点】: 基于Java开发，需配合Burp Suite使用
